items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Could Be 39% Undervalued On Earnings Date And Cost Saving Story
items.snippet: After a 17% slide in 30 days but a 1 year total return above 80%, Albemarle now sits at a crossroads. Against Albemarle's last close at $129.02, the most widely followed narrative places fair value at $212.74. Albemarle's story still hinges on lithium prices and project execution

items.headline: Albemarle Corporation to Release Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on Wednesday, August 5, 2026
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) is a world leader in transforming essential resources into critical ingredients for mobility, energy, connectivity and health.

items.headline: The U.S. Is Increasing Efforts to Rebuild Its Rare Earth Supply Chain
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) is the world's largest lithium producer. The company just posted a sharp turnaround: Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA jumped 148% year over year to $664 million as lithium prices rebounded from 2025 lows, and Albemarle retired $1.3 billion of debt during

items.headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Albemarle's Report
items.snippet: ALB is expected to release its Q2 2026 earnings soon. Analysts expect EPS of $3.21, up significantly from $0.11 in the year-ago quarter. For fiscal 2026, analysts project EPS of $13.15, up from a loss of $0.79 per share in fiscal 2025.

items.headline: Baird Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $178 From $224
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) closed the latest trading day at $88.50, a -0.9% change. Shares have seen an increase of 22.58% over the last month, surpassing the Basic Materials sector's gain of 0.53%.
